_comment: Regression FLOOR (not the 71% golden target in expected-findings.json). NIST recall is run-dependent: 5/14=36% on leaner 19-finding runs, 7/14=50% on the richer 27-finding SCHARDT runs. The floor is the conservative leaner-run number reproduced 2026-06-18; the guard fires only on a genuine drop below what the system currently ships. Tighten toward 50 only once the richer run is the committed default.
